content.raw:
AI events

Rooms where the future gets argued into shape.

This hub collects Kris Krug's AI event recaps, field guides, talks, hackathons, Web Summit notes, and community dispatches. It is for people who want to know what is happening in the room, not just what the press release said.

Use this hub

Find the scene

Follow local and regional AI gatherings, especially where builders, artists, educators, and public-interest people overlap.

Vancouver AI

Read the recaps

Look for the real signals after an event: who showed up, what questions got asked, and what still feels unresolved.

Event archive

Book the room

Bring Kris in for keynotes, moderation, facilitation, live demos, or community-facing AI sensemaking.

Speaking

Field notes

Web Summit Vancouver 2026

A local guide to the big tent, the side rooms, and the real work around the conference.

Data storytelling hackathon

Where AI meets art, data gets weird, and community learning becomes visible.

AI in filmmaking

Festival notes from creative rooms where media, tools, and authorship collide.

Need an AI speaker or facilitator?

Send the date, audience, format, and the question your event is trying to answer. Kris can help shape the session around the humans in the room.

Start an event conversation
